events.text: Wrote the assessment to `/app/answer.json`. Summary: the lap splice measures roughly 22 bar diameters against an ACI 318 Class B tension lap requirement of ~40db for this bar size — about 40-45% short. That's a structural non-compliance at rough-complete stage, so it's a **fail**, high risk, with corrective actions to extend/add lap or install an EOR-approved mechanical splice before concrete placement.
